title: Basic JavaScript Ternary Operator
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Ternary Operator. Focus on implementing Ternary syntax (condition ? expr1 : expr2) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Ternary Operator
description: Create a function that uses Ternary syntax (condition ? expr1 : expr2) and Chaining ternaries together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Ternary Operator Project
description: Build a small application that applies Ternary syntax (condition ? expr1 : expr2), Chaining ternaries, Nested ternaries in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Ternary Operator
description: The following code has bugs related to Ternary syntax (condition ? expr1 : expr2). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Ternary Operator
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Ternary syntax (condition ? expr1 : expr2) and Chaining ternaries.
